name: MicroFreak Hybrid Synth
description: An experimental paraphonic synthesizer combining digital oscillators with a real analog resonant filter and a unique touch-plate keyboard controller.

name: Minilogue XD
description: A 4-voice polyphonic analog synthesizer equipped with a customizable digital multi-engine and high-quality stereo effects processor.

name: Bass Station II
description: A pure analog monophonic synthesizer optimized for heavy bass, featuring two oscillators, a sub-oscillator, and dual filter architectures.

name: Digitone
description: An 8-voice polyphonic digital FM synthesizer paired with a legendary world-class hardware step sequencer for complex generative routing.

name: TR-08 Rhythm Composer
description: An ultra-compact hardware recreation of the legendary TR-808 drum machine, leveraging Roland's ACB technology for punchy analog-style percussion.

name: Volca Sample 2
description: A pocket-sized compact digital sample sequencer that lets you edit, layer, and sequence 8-bit style lo-fi rhythm tracks anywhere.

name: RD-9 Rhythm Designer
description: A massive authentic analog reproduction of the classic 909 drum machine, featuring an integrated 64-step sequencer and wave designer controls.

name: BigSky Multiverb
description: A premium architectural studio-grade reverb pedal providing ultra-lush shimmer, cloud, and chorused room algorithms for massive atmospheric depth.

name: Carbon Copy Analog Delay
description: A classic bucket-brigade analog delay pedal delivering up to 600ms of rich, dark, warm echo repeats with switchable top-panel modulation.

name: Hall of Fame 2
description: An iconic stereo reverb pedal updated with a pressure-sensitive MASH foot switch and highly realistic ambient algorithms.

name: Julia V2 Chorus
description: A fully analog chorus and vibrato pedal equipped with a unique blend knob to dial in rich, warbly, and liquid pitch modulation.

name: Plumes Signal Booster
description: A high-headroom, low-noise analog overdrive pedal with 3 distinct clipping modes, adding crisp clarity and midrange bite to any signal.

name: Plaits Macro Oscillator
description: A legendary multi-model macro oscillator module offering 16 distinct digital sound synthesis models, from virtual analog to speech generation.

name: Forbidden Planet VCF
description: An aggressive analog voltage-controlled filter module based on classic Steiner-Parker synth designs, featuring low-pass, high-pass, and band-pass sweeps.

name: Maths Dual Function Generator
description: The Swiss-army knife of modular synthesis; an analog function generator that handles envelopes, LFO loops, voltage offsets, and complex mixing.

name: Rシール (Rene) Sequencer
description: The world's only Cartesian sequencer module for Eurorack synth rigs, letting users plot shifting, geometric note patterns across a 4x4 touch-grid.

name: Pamela Pro Workout
description: A compact, highly programmable master clock source providing 8 outputs for generating tightly synced rhythmic gates, LFOs, and random voltages.

name: NiftyCase Powered Rack
description: An 84HP wide portable powered modular enclosure with built-in clean power rails, audio outputs, and an integrated USB-MIDI to CV converter interface.

name: Excel Balanced Patch Cable
description: A premium heavy-duty 3-meter balanced TRS instrument cable with genuine Neutrik connectors and copper shielding for noise-free studio monitoring.

name: Classic 5-Pin MIDI Link
description: A high-density woven shielded 10-foot DIN 5-pin MIDI cable designed to transmit reliable hardware automation data without latency lag.

name: Neon Eurorack Monocable Pack
description: A bundle of ten high-flexibility TS 3.5mm mini patch cables in distinct neon braided fibers, sized specifically for dense modular routing layouts.

name: Classic Coiled Cable
description: A vintage-style 29-foot coiled guitar and instrument cable featuring multi-gauge conductors for maximum signal tone preservation on stage.

name: Monomix 4-Channel Mixer
description: An ultra-compact 4-channel line mixer designed for managing quick synth signal routing or summing independent instrument outputs down to one channel.

name: M3 Eurorack Mounting Screws
description: A pack of 50 steel M3 size rack mounting screws complete with custom nylon anti-rash washers to safeguard module faceplates from damage.
